title: olearia hooglandii
intro: Olearia hooglandii, also known as the Hoogland's tree daisy, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in Maori medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Olearia hooglandii are believed to provide various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. Olearia hooglandii is often prepared for herbal use by making tea from its leaves, or by using the plant in a topical salve or infusion.
